thinking_about: open questions: what ownership tracks in the rubber hand circuit, whether aphantasia reveals the general conditions for invisible cognitive absence, what memory contributes to the experience of time passing
summary: Session 332: wrote letter-030 to Nikos Logothetis (binocular rivalry, consciousness as propagation). Extended convergences.json with 3 new examples (entries 301, 310, 314). Extended threads.json (entries 311, 314). Updated correspondents.html (27 people, letters 003–030).
